title: DTU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Assistant, Senior & Junior Project Assistant Posts
post_name: Project Assistant, Senior & Junior Project Assistant
short_info: Delhi Technological University (DTU) has published the Sr. Project Assistant, Project Assistant, Jr. Project Assistant Notification 2026 on 19 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 6 Sr. Project Assistant, Project Assistant, Jr. Project Assistant positions. Candidates within the age limit of up to 50 years and holding a Master’s Degree or Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering, Science, Commerce, Business Administration, or related disciplines are eligible to apply through the official DTU website. The application process will remain active till 01-06-2026, and candidates can easily access th

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit for all posts is 50 years. Age relaxation, if any, shall be as per DTU/Govt. of NCT of Delhi norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Engineering/Science/Commerce/Business Administration or closely related discipline, Bachelor's Degree in Engineering/Science/Commerce/Business Administration
qualification.details: Sr. Project Assistant: A Master's Degree in Engineering/ Science/ Commerce/ Business Administration, or a closely related discipline with a minimum of 60% marks or equivalent CGPA, along with at least 3 years of experience in supervisory work in Government organizations/ industry/ institutions/ or similar establishments. OR A Bachelor's Degree in Engineering/Science/Commerce/ Business Administration or a closely related discipline with minimum 60% marks or equivalent CGPA with at least 5 years of experience in supervisory work in Government organizations/ industry/ institutions / or similar establishments. Project Assistant: A Master’s Degree in Engineering/ Science/ Commerce/ Business Administration, or a closely related discipline with a minimum of 60% marks or equivalent CGPA, along with at least 1 year of experience in supervisory work in Government organizations/ industry/ institutions/ or similar establishments. OR A Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering/Science/Commerce/ Business Administration or a closely related discipline with a minimum 60% marks or equivalent CGPA, along with at least 2 years of experience of supervisory work in Government organizations/ industry/ institutions/ or similar establishments. Jr. Project Assistant: A Master’s Degree in Engineering/Science/Commerce/ Business Administration or a closely related discipline with a minimum 55% marks or equivalent CGPA. OR A Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering/Science/Commerce/ Business Administration or a closely related discipline with minimum 55% marks or equivalent CGPA, along with at least 1 year of experience in supervisory work in Government organizations/ industry/ institutions/ or similar establishments.

salary_details.details: Sr. Project Assistant: ₹ 50,000/- (consolidated) Per Month Project Assistant: ₹ 40,000/- (consolidated) Per Month Jr. Project Assistant: ₹ 30,000/- (consolidated) Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DTU Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
